name: Croutons and Croutes
recipeIngredient: 3 cups French or Italian bread, cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. Toss the bread cubes with 3 tablespoons olive oil.
2. Place the coated bread cubes on a baking sheet.
3. Brush the remaining 3 tablespoons olive oil onto the bread slices.
4. Place the brushed bread slices on the same baking sheet.
5. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 12 to 15 minutes, or until lightly browned and crisp.
Source: Southern Living 1993 Annual Recipes, MM, Norma Wrenn
